reasoning: Based on the evidence gathered, there was no official government announcement of an agreement before the July 1, 2025 deadline. The news reporting clearly established that while negotiations were in their 'final stages' in January 2025, the actual contract was not finalized by government officials until July 2025, and public reporting of the signed agreement (via Yonhap and other outlets) only occurred in mid-August 2025. Thus, the condition of announcing an agreement BEFORE July 1, 2025 was not met.
